identity.name: SonataFlow
identity.vibe: A Steinway piano in a modern minimalist loft. Classic soul, cutting-edge tech.

usage_rules.headings: Use Playfair Display for all H1-H3. Italicize key words for emphasis (e.g., 'Start *Recording*').
usage_rules.body: Manrope for all UI elements, settings, and instructions. High legibility is key.
usage_rules.data: Use JetBrains Mono for timecodes, frequency values, and MIDI data.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:opacity-90 transition-all duration-300 shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl active:scale-95

cards.style: bg-card border border-border/50 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-1

inputs.style: bg-transparent border-b-2 border-border focus:border-accent outline-none transition-colors px-0 py-2 rounded-none

textures.noise: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.03'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")

images.description: Moody, atmospheric shadow play of a musician - use for Landing Page Hero or Auth screens.
Close up of piano keys - use for 'About' section or empty states in History.

assets.icons: Use 'lucide-react' for all UI icons. Use thin stroke weights (1.5px) to match the elegant aesthetic.

landing.strategy: Immersive, emotional. Use the 'hero_background' image with a heavy gradient overlay. Large Playfair Display typography. 'Start Transcribing' CTA should be the 'gold_glow' gradient.

transcriber.strategy: Distraction-free. Top bar: Minimal controls. Center: VexFlow canvas (white bg in light mode, inverted in dark mode). Bottom: Audio visualizer (canvas) + Recording controls.

dashboard.strategy: Clean, data-rich but airy. Use the 'Bento' grid layout for saved songs. Each card shows a mini-preview of the sheet music (SVG) and date.

universal_rules: NEVER use default scrollbars. Use 'tailwind-scrollbar-hide' or custom thin styling.
Dark mode is NOT just black. It is #0A0A0A. Light mode is #FDFBF7 (Cream).
All interactive elements must have a 'data-testid'.
Ensure VexFlow canvas background adapts to the theme (White for Light, Dark Grey for Dark) for contrast.
